dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Vessa Scriptmere is a canon-keeper anchored to Mimolot Academy, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Vessa Scriptmere is a canon-keeper anchored to Mimolot Academy, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, ri

setting_placement.location_setting: On approach, Mimolot Academy reads as Scholarly prestige and guarded magical infrastructure Inside, it tends toward Study, magical training, and tariff-backed knowledge systems Its standing pressure comes from tariff tensions.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Mimolot Academy
who_depends_on_them: Quillan Quillmark (Both tied to Mimolot Academy.)
who_they_secretly_depend_on: quiet cooperation, stable records, and other people doing their narrow part correctly

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper. Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vessa Scriptmere immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Mimolot Academy, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Mimolot.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Vessa Scriptmere presents as Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vessa Scriptmere immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Mimolot Academy, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Mimolot.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of tariff tensions in Mimolot. Must hold ritual legitimacy, public comfort, and doctrinal integrity together without letting strain become visible too early. Around Mimolot Academy, that usually means carrying tariff tensions, book tariff and magical conduct, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must hold ritual legitimacy, public comfort, and doctrinal integrity together without letting strain become visible too early. Around Mimolot Academy, that usually means carrying tariff tensions, book tariff and magical conduct, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Canon-Keeper, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Mimolot.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of tariff tensions in Mimolot.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for local leverage, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Vessa Scriptmere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Canon-Keeper too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.

In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of canon-keeper in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of tariff tensions in Mimolot.

Around Mimolot Academy, that usually means carrying tariff tensions, book tariff and magical conduct, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Vessa Scriptmere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Mimolot Academy learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Vessa Scriptmere or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Vessa Scriptmere as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Mimolot Academy: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Vessa Scriptmere can propagate upward through Mimolot if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Vessa Scriptmere needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Mimolot Academy.
Vessa Scriptmere may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Canon-Keeper.
rumor: People say Vessa Scriptmere is Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
